title: BT 4600 Cordless Phone with Answering Machine - Twin Handsets, Silver
subtitle: BT 4600 Cordless Phone
overview: Offering large buttons, an answering machine and hearing aid compatibility, this twin handset BT 4600 Cordless Phone with Answering Machine set offers feature-rich home phones that makes staying in touch easy. Each handset has its own charging base station.Easy to see and hearA big-button interface makes each handset in this BT 4600 Phone Set ideal for all users and is especially useful to those with impaired vision.Additionally, they're equipped with an inductive coupler and earpiece volume control so if you've got a hearing aid (including models with a T position), taking phone calls is clearer and simpler.Control your callsThe BT 4600 Cordless Phone helps you stay in control over your landline with its advance call blocker feature. Monitor which calls you want to receive and which numbers you need to block – great for preventing promotional callers from disrupting your evening.There's a call display feature too, allowing you to view numbers in advance and take calls when you're able

title: BT 3960 Cordless Phone - Twin Handsets, Black
subtitle: BT 3960 Cordless Phone
overview: Staying in touch has never been easier with this BT cordless phone. It saves up to 50 contacts so you can call your buddies without dialling their numbers every time. Its LCD backlit screen lets you check who's calling you before greeting them. And you can avoid spammy calls with its nuisance call blocker.  Good to know  - No more cutting short on important messages – the answering machine has 12 minutes of recording time - Take your calls anywhere in your room with its 50 m indoor range - Chat while you get your chores done – its speakerphone lets you call hands-free - Call anybody from your recent call log with the redial feature__________________________________Please note: You must subscribe to a Caller Display service from your network provider for the nuisance call block and caller display features to work. Charges may apply.

subtitle: PANASONIC KX-TGJ424EB Cordless Phone
overview:

Now you can take the calls you want without dealing with any automated voices. 
You can press the nuisance call block button to add callers to your block list when the phone is ringing or even mid-call, so they won't bother you again.
Organise your contacts
With space for up to 250 contacts there's plenty of space for handy numbers like the local GP surgery alongside your friends and family contacts. You can even categorise your contacts and assign different ringtones for each category, so you know right away when your brother is calling

title: PANASONIC KX-TGJ423EB Cordless Phone - Triple Handsets, Black
subtitle: PANASONIC KX-TGJ423EB Cordless Phone
overview:
Top features: - Avoid unwanted callers with nuisance call blocking - Organise your contacts for faster calling - Never miss a message, even when you're away from home - Transfer calls easily to other family members Avoid unwanted callersKeep unwanted callers at bay with the Panasonic KX-TGJ423EB Cordless Phone. Automated call blocking asks callers that aren't in your phonebook to press a number before the call goes through to filter out unwanted calls. Now you can take the calls you want without dealing with any automated voices. 
You can press the nuisance call block button to add callers to your block list when the phone is ringing or even mid-call, so they won't bother you again.
Organise your contacts
With space for up to 250 contacts there's plenty of space for handy numbers like the local GP surgery alongside your friends and family contacts. You can even categorise your contacts and assign different ringtones for each category, so you know right away when your brother is calling
key_features: Block up to 100% of nuisance calls

subtitle: MOTOROLA E211 Cordless Phone
overview: Stay in touch the easy way with this Motorola cordless phone. It comes with a built-in answering machine that gives you up to 12 minutes of recording time - so you won't miss a message. You can block unwanted calls by type or up to 10 specific numbers, perfect for stopping those unwanted sales calls. Save your regular contacts in the built-in directory for quick and easy access. Need a bit of quiet time? Just press the do not disturb button to silence the ringer instantly.Good to know- The speakerphone lets you chat hands-free - perfect when you're cooking or working- With a clear digital display and simple controls, getting started is a breeze.- With up to 200 hours of standby time, you won't need to worry about charging it all the time- You'll get up to 10 hours of talk time - plenty for long chats with friends and family
key_features: Nuisance call blocking by type or number

specs.value: 150 x 75 x 115 mm (H x W x D)
Handset, Base unit x 1, Rechargeable batteries, Mains power supply, Telephone line cord, Quick start guide
